examples.text: خَلَقَ الْإِنْسَانَ مِن صَلْصَالٍ كَالْفَخَّارِ / وَخَلَقَ الجَانَّ مِنْ مَارِجٍ مِنْ نَارٍ
examples.english: Man, He made out of argil, like pottery. / Spirits, He made out of a blaze of fire.

senses.gloss: clay; argil; any substance that may be worked and shaped like clay (like playdough); modeling clay
sticky sand-mixed earth; loam; Sticky soft clay: that is used to make pottery, chinaware, and sculpted artifacts; sculpting clay

etymology.text: Unknown. Has been compared to Old Armenian շաղեմ (šałem, “to knead or mix e.g. mortar”), շաղախ (šałax, “clay, mud, mortar”).
